subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Upon thee be the glory of God, the True Sovereign, the Just, the All-Knowing. The servant who standeth present hath appeared with thy letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم علیک بهاء الله الملک الحق العدل العلیم قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتابک و
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @thankfulness; gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
